subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-12
subcodes.first_line: Nadir Shah was one of the great rulers of Persia and during his military career he conquered India and many other countries. He was a resourceful leader
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @stories; anecdotes, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
